description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge extension on the left side, designed for comfort and urban living spaces. The sofa features a low, straight backrest and squared armrests that are flush with the back and seat height, giving it a clean, contemporary silhouette. The seat and back cushions are uniform, thick, and appear to be attached, providing a seamless look across the seating area. The upholstery is a solid, dark color with a matte finish, suggesting a soft fabric material. The sofa is supported by short, sturdy legs positioned at the corners and possibly a central support, all of which are minimally visible and likely made of metal or wood. This piece is suitable for placement in public urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or outdoor lounges, offering ample seating and a robust, inviting appearance.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, low straight backrest, squared armrests, and solid dark matte upholstery. It features thick, uniform cushions and short, sturdy legs for a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, chaise lounge on the left, and the sofa's low, straight backrest and squared armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniform height of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the main seating section and the squared armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three thick, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and forming a continuous surface, with a sectional layout including a chaise lounge.
attribute_armrest_style: Squared, straight armrests at both ends, flush with the seat and backrest height, with no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Short, straight legs positioned at the corners and possibly a central support, minimally visible, likely made of metal or wood, with a simple, functional design.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with attached cushions, matching the length of the seat and providing a uniform profile.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
